originalTitle: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
summary: Trump-selected Fed chair Kevin Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does. Past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.
content: Trump-selected Fed chair Kevin Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does. Past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.
chineseTitle: 这次牛市不会因为沃什领导下的美联储加息而结束
chineseSummary: 特朗普任命的美联储主席凯文·沃什可能希望加息威胁就足够了。但如果他这样做，股市可能会上涨。过去的加息周期可以作为参考。
chineseContent: 特朗普任命的美联储主席凯文·沃什可能希望加息威胁就足够了。但如果他这样做，股市可能会上涨。过去的加息周期可以作为参考。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
